zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏多延续
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD维持窄幅震荡上行结构，价格运行在6.87附近并逼近日内高点6.8753，整体呈现轻微多头延续格局，但动能仍偏温和，尚未形成趋势性突破。

技术指标方面，MACD为0.034显示轻度多头动能，价格持续站稳SMA20上方6.81425，短期均线支撑有效，但RSI缺失使超买判断不够明确，动能确认仍需观察。

支撑位关注6.814附近SMA20与6.80整数关口，下方若失守或回测6.75区域；阻力集中6.875及6.90附近，突破需放量确认，否则易回落整理。

交易策略建议以区间短线为主，未有效突破6.875前谨慎追多，可在6.80-6.82分批低吸，高位6.88上方可考虑止盈，严格设置跌破6.80的风控止损

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is showing mild upward bias within a tight consolidation range after a period of low volatility. Price action near 6.87 sits close to session highs, indicating buyers are defending intraday dips. The market structure suggests a short-term recovery attempt rather than a strong breakout, with momentum gradually improving as price holds above recent lows around 6.83. Overall tone remains cautiously constructive.

MACD reading at 0.034 shows a positive histogram bias, suggesting bullish momentum is slowly building, though confirmation is limited without a visible signal line value. Price trading above the 20-day SMA at 6.814 reinforces a short-term bullish alignment. However, absent RSI data limits overbought/oversold clarity, so momentum should be interpreted cautiously. Overall conditions favor gradual upside continuation if volume supports.

Immediate support is established at 6.835, followed by stronger confluence around the 20-day SMA near 6.81. A break below this zone could expose downside toward 6.75. On the upside, resistance is clustered at 6.8753, the recent high, with a potential extension toward 6.90 if momentum continues and buyers maintain control above current consolidation. Sellers may attempt to fade moves near resistance until a clear breakout occurs.

For traders, a breakout strategy above 6.88 with volume confirmation may target 6.90–6.95, while conservative buyers may prefer entries on pullbacks toward 6.81–6.83 support. Risk management remains key due to compressed volatility, with tight stop-losses below 6.80 to avoid false breakdowns in this range-bound environment. Momentum confirmation is essential before scaling into larger positions in either direction. Patience is favored in this low-volatility setup.
